title: erythroxylum macrophyllum var. macrocnemium
intro: Erythroxylum macrophyllum var. macrocnemium is a plant species that belongs to the Erythroxylaceae family, commonly known as the coca family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and use may be limited due to regulations surrounding the plant's cultivation and trade.
